finding_results.notes: Replaced all five cited room/fan pressure beats with bodily and object-driven cues: Nura's folder squeak, Halima's grease-slick grip and task reflex, the cot-bar click in Nura's hand, Halima's blanched grip when Aminul enters, and spilled tea plus Nura's delayed swallow after the file warning.
finding_results.summary: The lodge scene now registers pressure through bodies, touch, and objects instead of repeating the same room/fan personification formula.
